# Third-Party Notices

This directory vendors selected third-party source archives. For each vendored
package, keep the upstream license text and any upstream NOTICE file in
`external/licenses/<package>/`.

- Package: google-cloud-cpp
- Version: 2.47.1
- Copyright: Google LLC and contributors

The upstream v2.47.1 source archive contains a `LICENSE` file and no `NOTICE`
file. If a future upstream archive adds a `NOTICE` file, copy it into
`external/licenses/google-cloud-cpp/NOTICE` and reference it here.
